markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Elena Micic wins the Micic vs Ansari professional tennis match in the 2026 W50 PALMA DEL RÍO Quarterfinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Micic vs Ansari professional tennis match in the 2026 W50 PALMA DEL RÍO Quarterfinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Elena Micic win the Micic vs Ansari: W50 PALMA DEL RÍO Quarterfinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Corey Seager records 4+ hits in the Texas vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026 at 7:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Corey Seager is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Corey Seager starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Corey Seager is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Corey Seager is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Corey Seager: 4+ hits?
